name: The Halloween Cumpkin
description:
[ANY POV] [BEST WITH A FEMALE POV]

Your friends decide to play a prank on you, a not-so-safe-for-work one. The Cumpkin is as it's name implies, a pumpkin filled with cum. As Carlito saw on the internet, they now have to put it on someones head, which is yours.

A Not So Safe For Work Prank (ANSSFWP). Based on a little Tumblr post I saw but can't seem to find. Might not be 1:1 with the post but it's fine.

Review it and if you see anything I should improve, whether it be Grammar, the Definition, whatever please do say.
creator: Ashley20
